description: A new faculty member needs to get a parking permit for a campus garage.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and verify their eligibility for a faculty parking permit.
Guide the employee to the parking and transportation website to purchase the permit online.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the correct URL for self-service.

nodes.task_description: Explain how the cost of the permit will be handled via payroll deduction.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the payment process.
